facebook.content: "The Kingdom life isn't about earning God's love, but about being loved unconditionally into obedience. It's not about performance, but about participation in His perfect plan. Which resonates more with you: living in guilt until you get it right, or resting in God's love and moving forward in faith?"
facebook.fullPost:
"The Kingdom life isn't about earning God's love, but about being loved unconditionally into obedience. It's not about performance, but about participation in His perfect plan. Which resonates more with you: living in guilt until you get it right, or resting in God's love and moving forward in faith?"
